case_title: DK CONSULTING INC. VS. VEVENCIO TORRES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-23-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DK CONSULTING INC. REPRESENTED BY SCOTT D CASS, COMPLIANCE OFFICER IS PRESENT VIA (UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM DIAL IN BY PHONE). DEFENDANT VEVENCIO TORRES IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO SUBMIT A TIMELY AND PROPER ZOOM REQUEST IF TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT COURT DATE BY ZOOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PLAINTIFF'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
